final_reporting.description:
Assemble the project-level final report: cross-stage narrative, dashboard
index, key figures, methods + caveats. Final node before SME review.

reporting.description:
Assemble narrative tables, figures, and summary text from upstream stage
outputs into a per-stage HTML / Markdown report. Modality-agnostic; bio
taxonomies override the description at the include site to specify what
goes into the report.

time_series_decompose.description:
Decompose a time-series panel into trend / seasonality / residual
components and run stationarity diagnostics. Method-neutral: the
concrete decomposition (STL, classical additive/multiplicative,
X-13ARIMA-SEATS) is selected at runtime by the agent. Closes
Phase 6.1 B.1 of the dag-design-v3-v4-100-percent-closure plan —
the time_series_forecast archetype previously had no producer for
this stage and dispatch failed with GoalUnreachable.

time_series_forecast_evaluate.description:
Produce point forecasts + prediction intervals over the named
horizon and evaluate against a held-out window. Emits a tabular
forecast table tagged as a statistical estimate (data:0951) so
the v4 planner can match it to the
`time_series_forecast` archetype goal. Closes Phase 6.1 B.1 of
the dag-design-v3-v4-100-percent-closure plan.

time_series_model_fit.description:
Fit a forecasting model family (ARIMA / state-space / exponential
smoothing / Prophet) to the decomposed panel. Method-neutral: the
concrete model family is chosen at runtime by the agent based on
the SME-named model and series characteristics; the atom emits a
fitted-model artifact consumed by the downstream forecast-evaluate
atom. Closes Phase 6.1 B.1 of the
dag-design-v3-v4-100-percent-closure plan.

validate_final_reporting.description:
Validate outputs of: Assemble the project-level final report: cross-stage narrative, dashboard
index, key figures, methods + caveats. Final node before SME review.
